mapper.select: SELECT t.team_id, t.created_by, u.user_name, t.team_name, t.team_code, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM team t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.created_by = u.user_id WHERE t.created_by = #{createdBy} ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TEAM_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(team_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM team WHERE team_id LIKE 'TEAM_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_%'
insert into team ( team_id, created_by, team_name, team_code ) values ( #{teamId}, #{createdBy}, #{teamName}, #{teamCode} )
